Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo

Class CritterGizmoGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.CritterGizmoGenerator
public class CritterGizmoGenerator extends Object
Facade that orchestrates the full Gizmo-based code generation pipeline for a Morphia entity, including field/method accessor injection and property/entity model generation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CritterGizmoGenerator(Mapper mapper)
    Creates a new CritterGizmoGenerator with the given mapper.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
    byte[]
    fieldAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode> fields)
    Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its fields.
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
    GizmoEntityModelGenerator
    generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
    byte[]
    methodAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode> methods)
    Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its getter methods.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator
    varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
    Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the given field (used in runtime mode).
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator
    varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
    Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method (used in runtime mode).

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • CritterGizmoGenerator

      public CritterGizmoGenerator(Mapper mapper)
      Creates a new CritterGizmoGenerator with the given mapper.
      Parameters:
      mapper - the Morphia mapper

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public GizmoEntityModelGenerator generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
      Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class to process
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive generated bytecode
      runtimeMode - true to generate VarHandle-based accessors for runtime use
      Returns:
      the generated entity model generator

    • generate

      public GizmoEntityModelGenerator generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
      Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class to process
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive generated bytecode
      Returns:
      the generated entity model generator

    • fieldAccessors

      public byte[] fieldAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode> fields)
      Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its fields.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class to augment
      fields - the fields for which accessor methods should be generated
      Returns:
      the augmented class bytecode

    • methodAccessors

      public byte[] methodAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode> methods)
      Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its getter methods.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class to augment
      methods - the getter methods for which accessor methods should be generated
      Returns:
      the augmented class bytecode

    • propertyAccessor

      public PropertyAccessorGenerator propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
      Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      field - the field for which a property accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property accessor generator

    • propertyAccessor

      public PropertyAccessorGenerator propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
      Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      method - the getter method for which a property accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property accessor generator

    • varHandleAccessor

      public VarHandleAccessorGenerator varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
      Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the given field (used in runtime mode).
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      field - the field for which a VarHandle accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted VarHandle accessor generator

    • varHandleAccessor

      public VarHandleAccessorGenerator varHandleAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
      Generates and registers a VarHandle-based accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method (used in runtime mode).
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      method - the getter method for which a VarHandle accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted VarHandle accessor generator

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.FieldNode field)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      field - the field for which a property model should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property model generator

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.MethodNode method)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      method - the getter method for which a property model should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property model generator

    • entityModel

      public GizmoEntityModelGenerator entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
      Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      classNode - the ASM class node for the entity
      properties - the list of property model generators for the entity's properties
      Returns:
      the emitted entity model generator
